prompt: I have a Trello OpenAPI spec at trello-openapi.json. Can you tell me what endpoints are available for managing checklists? I want to know the paths, HTTP methods, and what parameters they accept.

assertions.text: Lists at least 5 distinct checklist-related endpoint paths
Shows HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) for the endpoints
Lists query or path parameters for at least one endpoint
Output is organized in a structured, easy-to-scan format (not a wall of raw JSON)
